title: microsorum decurrens
intro: Microsorum decurrens, also known as the 'Australian Water Fern', is a species of fern native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Microsorum decurrens include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used to treat conditions such as digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections.
